message:
Fix blank card empty state and persist collapse/expand state (#4900)

When a card finishes loading but has no data, CardWrapper now shows a
fallback empty state (icon + message + retry button) instead of rendering
blank content. This catches cards that don't implement their own
showEmptyState check. Children are still mounted (hidden) so they can
resume when data arrives.

Collapse/expand state is now applied immediately on page navigation when
the user previously collapsed a card. The delay mechanism (which prevents
skeleton-then-collapse jank on first load) is skipped when localStorage
already has a saved collapse state for the card, eliminating the flash of
expanded state on route changes.

Fixes #4894, #4895

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
